response.original_title: Toni Servillo in Monsieur Baudelaire, quando finirà la notte?
response.overview: From Sala A in Via Asiago, Rome, an evening in honour of Toni Servillo, in which the actor and director from Afragola engages with the poetry and prose of Charles Baudelaire in a monologue written for the theatre by Giuseppe Montesano.
response.title: Toni Servillo in Monsieur Baudelaire, quando finirà la notte?
